# Posten signering

> REST API and client libraries for requesting legally binding electronic signatures from Norwegian citizens using BankID and other eIDs.

## Concepts

- [Signature flow](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/signeringsflyt.html): Overview of direct flow (embedded in sender's portal) and portal flow (Posten's signing portal).
- [Signature type](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/signaturtype.html): Supported eID-based signature types and their legal validity.
- [Signed documents](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/signert-dokument.html): Structure of the resulting signed document, signature formats, and ASiC-E packaging.

## Sender Portal

- [The sender portal](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/avsenderportalen.html): Web UI for managing signature requests without API integration.
- [Send requests for signing](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/send-dokument-avsenderportalen.html): Step-by-step guide for sending documents through the sender portal.

## Signature Requests

- [Create signature request](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/opprette-oppdrag.html): Fields, requirements, and constraints for creating signature jobs via the API.
- [Addressing signers](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/adressering-av-undertegner.html): Two methods for identifying signers: national identity number or email/SMS contact info.
- [Signer notifications](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/varsler-til-undertegner.html): Rules for when notifications are sent to signers and how to customize notification texts.
- [Changing a signature request](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/endring-av-signeringsoppdrag.html): How to cancel or modify an in-progress signature request.
- [Sender notifications](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/varsler-til-avsender.html): Configuring notification emails to the sender on signing events.
- [Storage](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lagring.html): How signed documents are stored and retrieved after signing completes.
- [Security level](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/sikkerhetsniv%C3%A5.html): Required eID security level (e.g. BankID) per signature request.
- [Chained signing](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/kjedet-signatur.html): Sequential signing order where each signer is notified only after the previous one completes.

## Client Integration

- [Buy enterprise certificates](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/buy-enterprise-certificates.html): How to obtain Buypass or Commfides enterprise certificates for API authentication.
- [Install enterprise certificate](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/install-enterprise-certificate.html): Installing certificates in Java keystores or Windows certificate stores.
- [Get a client library](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/get-client-library.html): Official Java and .NET client libraries via Maven/NuGet.
- [Create client configuration](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/create-client-configuration.html): Configuring the client with sender org number, certificate, and target environment.
- [Direct flow](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/direct-flow.html): Embed signing in your own portal — create job, redirect signer, poll status, download signed document.
- [Portal flow](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/portal-flow.html): Use Posten's signing portal — create job, signers notified by email/SMS, poll status, download.
- [Archive client](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/archive-client.html): Retrieve signed documents from Posten's long-term archive after the job expires.
- [Error handling](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/error-handling.html): Error types, HTTP status codes, and how to handle them.
- [Debugging](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/client-integration/debugging.html): Enabling request/response logging and diagnosing integration issues.

## Self-Developed Integration

- [Document package](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/egen-integrasjon/dokumentpakke.html): ASiC-E container format — documents, metadata XML, and manifest structure for raw API use.
- [Security](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/egen-integrasjon/sikkerhet.html): Signing API requests with enterprise certificates when not using an official client library.

## Testing & Operations

- [Test environment](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/testing/introduction.html): Public test environment with mock identities; no real eID credentials needed.
- [BankID test users](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/testing/bankid.html): Test user credentials for simulating BankID signing in the test environment.

## Optional

- [Why use Posten signering](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/introduksjon.html): Business rationale and service overview.
- [GDPR](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/gdpr.html): Data processing, retention periods, and GDPR compliance details.
- [IP addresses](https://signering-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ip-adresser.html): Outbound IP addresses for firewall allowlisting.
